---
name: Scientific Content Correction
about: Report inaccuracies or suggest improvements to scientific content
title: '[SCIENCE] '
labels: science, content
assignees: ''
---

## 📚 Content Issue
**Which section/page contains the issue?**
- [ ] Experimental data
- [ ] References/citations
- [ ] Evidence evaluation
- [ ] Historical information
- [ ] Theoretical explanation
- [ ] Other: ____________

## 🔍 Issue Description
A clear description of the scientific inaccuracy or improvement needed.

## ✅ Current Content
What the content currently says (quote or describe):

## 📝 Proposed Correction
What it should say instead:

## 📖 Sources
**Please provide reliable sources to support your correction:**
- [ ] Peer-reviewed journal article (preferred)
- [ ] Conference proceedings
- [ ] Book/textbook
- [ ] Reputable research institution report
- [ ] Other: ____________

**Source details:**
1. Author(s):
2. Title:
3. Journal/Publisher:
4. Year:
5. DOI/URL:

## 🌐 Language
- [ ] English version needs correction
- [ ] Polish version needs correction  
- [ ] Both versions need correction
- [ ] Translation improvement needed

## ⚖️ Evidence Level
- [ ] Well-established scientific fact
- [ ] Widely accepted theory
- [ ] Experimental observation
- [ ] Hypothesis/theoretical proposal
- [ ] Controversial/disputed claim

## 🚨 Priority
- [ ] Critical error (misleading/incorrect)
- [ ] Important (affects understanding)
- [ ] Minor (small improvement)
- [ ] Enhancement (additional context)

## 📋 Additional Context
Any other relevant information, context, or related issues.
